## Summary
What does this change and why?

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (additive / backward-compatible)
- [ ] Docs / translation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean (or justified)
- [ ] No secrets or private infrastructure details added
- [ ] Backward-compatible / opt-in (no behavior change for existing courses)

## Related issues
Closes #
